strengths: Proven analytics with quantified acquisition impact
Experience building dashboards and ETL pipelines
weaknesses: Lacks explicit finance/NPV or ROI modeling
improvement_bullets: Spearheaded A/B testing initiatives for marketing campaigns, utilizing customer segmentation and Python-based analysis to optimize messaging and drive a 300% increase in new customer acquisition.
Developed comprehensive business cases for marketing initiatives, translating complex data into strategic ROI analyses that informed budget allocation and project prioritization.
Executed end-to-end campaign measurement, leveraging Google Analytics and CRM data to track performance against acquisition targets and communicate key opportunities to stakeholders.
Integrated economic forecasting and trend analysis into customer segment models, enabling proactive identification of performance headwinds and development of data-backed growth strategies.
Performed rigorous Net Present Value (NPV) and return on investment (ROI) modeling for new service initiatives, ensuring all operational changes aligned with financial performance goals.
cover_letter: Hiring Manager, JetBlue, New York, NY. Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Senior Analyst Loyalty CoBrand Acq opportunity with JetBlue. I am interested in this opportunity because of my passion for data-driven customer loyalty and JetBlue’s reputation for disrupting the travel industry with a customer-centric focus. What interests me about working for JetBlue is its mission to inspire humanity through a culture of Safety, Caring, and Integrity; this commitment to excellence aligns with my professional values. I believe my expertise in advanced data analytics and my cross-functional collaboration skills would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems by translating complex performance data into actionable growth strategies. In fact, at Shine Masters, I developed interactive Power BI dashboards and time-series models to identify high-value customer segments, which informed targeted marketing initiatives and contributed to a 300% increase in new customer acquisition over 12 months. This result mirrors the growth-focused nature of the Senior Analyst position at JetBlue. Ultimately, I know that the Senior Analyst Loyalty CoBrand Acq role at JetBlue would allow me to bring my proficiency in SQL and Python to support acquisition targets. Additionally, my role as a Data Analyst and Operations Lead at Shine Masters enabled me to develop my business case and forecasting skills. I led the creation of operational SOPs and performance reports that reduced bottlenecks by 25%, proving my ability to manage complex project workflows. I am excited by the opportunity to use my background in campaign measurement and ROI analysis in working on acquisition channels at JetBlue. I know that my technical analytical skill set and my ability to partner with cross-functional teams align with what it takes to succeed at the Senior Analyst Loyalty CoBrand Acq role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
